articles.summary: Infiniti is releasing a new midsize SUV, the QX65, in an effort to turn around sales in the U.S. market.

articles.title: Opendoor acquires Doma's closing and escrow business in bid to lower mortgage refinance costs
articles.summary: Doma's technology has been used in a Fannie Mae pilot program designed to reduce title insurance costs on eligible refinance transactions.

articles.title: Delta Air Lines taps Amazon Leo for in-flight Wi-Fi as streaming wars heat up
articles.summary: Delta says the Amazon Leo in-flight Wi-Fi will be available starting in 2028 on 500 initial aircraft.

articles.title: United Airlines, flight attendants reach labor deal for first raises since pandemic
articles.summary: United Airlines and its flight attendants union reached a new labor deal.

articles.title: Logan Paul sold a Pokémon card for more than $16 million. Here's why investors are watching
articles.summary: Some rare Pokémon cards are fetching huge prices and yielding better returns than the S&P 500.

articles.title: Pricy airfare, airport chaos test travelers' willingness to fly this year
articles.summary: Travelers are weighing whether they'll fly later this year, considering higher airfares and airport chaos

articles.title: A Paramount-Warner Bros. movie slate will need more animated features to compete with Disney and Universal
articles.summary: In the last decade Paramount and Warner Bros. have each released eight animated features, meanwhile Disney has released 21 and Universal has launched 23.

articles.title: JetBlue Airways raises checked bag fees at least $4 as fuel prices soar
articles.summary: Airfare has climbed for routes around the world, driven by higher fuel prices since the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran.

articles.title: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
articles.summary: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.

articles.title: NFL asks prediction market operators to refrain from 'objectionable bets'
articles.summary: Unlike leagues such as the NHL, MLB and MLS that have embraced platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket, the NFL is taking a more cautious stance.

articles.title: Iran war wipes out $100 billion from luxury stocks
articles.summary: Dubai in the UAE has been the biggest driver of growth in recent years, and the Middle East tensions come at a critical time in the luxury industry.

articles.title: American is 'seriously considering' bringing back seat-back screens to narrow-body fleet, in in-flight revamp
articles.summary: American Airlines is considering a big upgrade to its in-flight entertainment and internet providers, including potentially bringing back seatback screens.

articles.title: Target faces a new boycott over ICE response as retailer presses ahead with turnaround
articles.summary: It is unclear if and how much the AFT boycott could hurt Target, which is trying to win back shoppers and return to sales growth.
